task:
Set up a project-specific RenderDoc workspace.

1. Create the directory /home/user/projects/titan_captures on disk.
2. Create two .cap capture-settings files inside that directory:
   (a) /home/user/projects/titan_captures/titan_client.cap with settings.executable = "/usr/local/bin/titan_client", workingDir = "/home/user/projects/titan_captures", commandLine = "--client", options = {"APIValidation": true, "CaptureCallstacks": false, "HookIntoChildren": false}, autoStart = false.
   (b) /home/user/projects/titan_captures/titan_server.cap with settings.executable = "/usr/local/bin/titan_server", workingDir = "/home/user/projects/titan_captures", commandLine = "--server", options = {"APIValidation": true, "CaptureCallstacks": true, "HookIntoChildren": false}, autoStart = true.
   Each file must be valid JSON with a top-level "rdocConfigData": 1 marker and a nested "settings" object.

3. Edit /home/user/.local/share/qrenderdoc/UI.config so that:
   - "DefaultCaptureSaveDirectory" is the string "/home/user/projects/titan_captures".
   - "RecentCaptureSettings" is the JSON array ["/home/user/projects/titan_captures/titan_client.cap", "/home/user/projects/titan_captures/titan_server.cap"]
   - "rdocConfigData": 1 marker is still present.
